name: psychquant-claude-plugins
description: Che Cheng's Claude Code Plugin Marketplace - 學術研究與生產力工具

plugins.name: mcp-tools
plugins.description: MCP Server 開發工具集：mcp-new-app、mcp-deploy、mcp-install、mcp-upgrade、mcp-clone、mcp-publish、mcp-sync、mcp-diagnose、mcp-debug、mcp-test、mcp-to-plugin、mcp-issue

plugins.name: plugin-tools
plugins.description: Claude Code Plugin 完整生命週期工具：plugin-create、plugin-upgrade、plugin-deploy、plugin-update、plugin-health、plugin-debug. v1.15.0: README Freshness Gate 從 3 信號擴展到 6（新增 component inventory drift / tool count drift / version history multi-version gap）+ 2 suppressions（no-version-section / wrapper-only commits）— 從跨 28 plugin 大規模 audit 萃取的盲點。

plugins.name: issue-driven-dev
plugins.description: Issue-driven development methodology: idd-issue → idd-diagnose → idd-implement → idd-verify → idd-close with enforced checklist + semantic gates. v2.30.0: (1) idd-issue gains explicit data-preservation HARD RULE — all source attachments uploaded to attachments release by default without asking; new Source Type Adapter table covers .docx / .pdf / Telegram / Apple Mail / Notes / pasted text + dedicated Telegram fallback flow when MCP lacks download_file (lists each attachment with timestamp/sender/caption and asks user to save to specific paths). Step 4 renamed from '附加圖片（如果有）' to '附加所有原始素材（鐵律：預設全保留）' with violation checklist. Closes a recurring gap where Telegram-sourced issues silently dropped attachments because asking-by-default was the safer-but-wrong fallback (see kiki830621/collaboration_gukai#5 SNQ PDF + 2 timeline images). (2) idd-implement gains --with-skill <name> + --extra '<text>' flags for delegating GREEN-phase execution to another skill (e.g., perspective-writer for prose deliverables) and free-text additional constraints. New Step 1.5 Resolve Extra Requirements merges flag values + diagnosis-Strategy auto-detection of '透過 X' / 'via X' patterns. Implementation Plan template gains '### Extra Requirements' section. Step 3 GREEN phase calls Skill(skill=...) instead of direct Edit when with_skill set. Spectra-warranted complexity ignores the flag (spectra-apply has its own sub-skill orchestration). First-class formalization of the idd-implement × perspective-writer integration pattern that emerged in kiki830621/collaboration_gukai#4. v2.29.0: Two-tier gate in idd-close — Step 0 structural gate (v2.17.0+) refuses close on unticked `- [ ]`; new Step 1.6 semantic gate (v2.29.0+) does keyword extraction on each `- [x]` bullet and verifies test/spec/file mentions correspond to real commits/artifacts in #NNN. Three keyword classes: (1) test/regression → must have test-file changes in #NNN commits; (2) spec artifact path → file must exist; (3) backtick file path → must appear in #NNN changed files. Warn-only with AskUserQuestion (proceed/investigate/edit) — keyword extraction has false positives so doesn't hard-refuse. This makes IDD's falsifiability surface a strict superset of TDD ∪ SDD: outcome verification inherited from idd-implement TDD loop and spectra-apply spec conformance, plus IDD-only audit-level semantic check on the close gate. v2.28.0: idd-all SDD path is now an unattended chain — spectra-discuss → spectra-propose → spectra-apply with explicit unattended hints in args that suppress sub-skill AskUserQuestion checkpoints (one-round discuss convergence, no Park/Apply prompt at propose Step 10, no continue-confirmation at apply Step 4). idd-all calls spectra-apply itself rather than relying on propose to chain (propose has architectural NEVER-invoke-apply guardrail). New core principle: 'Unattended assumption' — orchestrator overrides sub-skill attended-by-default contracts via args, not by modifying sub-skills. v2.27.0: PR vs direct-commit path routing in idd-implement (--pr / --no-pr flag, fork-aware default, new pr_policy config field always/never/ask). idd-close gate-checks open PRs and refuses close when a PR for the issue is unmerged. idd-all explicitly enforces PR path. New references/pr-flow.md as canonical contract document. v2.25.0: monorepo + multi-repo support via config-protocol — six-mechanism resolution (per-invocation flag → ask_each_time menu → predicates → cascading walk-up → git remote fallback → orthogonal groups). idd-issue accepts `--target owner/repo` or `--target group:<label>`; sibling skills accept `--repo owner/repo` (idd-comment keeps `--target` for link target). New optional config fields: `candidates[]` (multi-target list with optional `when` predicates: path_contains/path_matches/git_remote_matches/git_branch_matches/title_matches/label_in/type_in/body_matches/priority_in/all/any/not), `groups[]` (multi-repo coordinated issue creation: primary + tracking with bidirectional cross-link comments and tracking_body_mode minimal/full), `ask_each_time`. Two-stage resolution in idd-issue: Step 0.5 evaluates path/git predicates for tentative default; Step 2.5 re-evaluates content predicates after title/labels gathered and prompts to switch if a better match exists. Cascading walk-up follows eslint/tsconfig pattern: first `.claude/issue-driven-dev.local.json` from cwd up to $HOME wins. Backward compatible: configs without candidates/groups/when behave exactly as v2.22.x. See plugins/issue-driven-dev/references/config-protocol.md for full algorithm. v2.22.1 codex pinning + v2.22.0 JSON config + v2.21.0 fork-aware + v2.18.0 bootstrap discipline retained. Commit convention unchanged: (#NNN) or Refs #NNN, NEVER Closes/Fixes/Resolves trailers (they bypass idd-close gate).

plugins.name: che-apple-mail-mcp
plugins.description: Apple Mail MCP server — 44 tools, SQLite 毫秒搜尋, .emlx 解析, 批次操作. v2.6.0: archive-mail 加 YAML frontmatter + .threads.json thread 關係索引，新增 /archive-mail-view 和 /archive-mail-rebuild-threads 兩個 skill. 疊加 v2.5.0 composing tools format 參數 + v2.4.0 搜尋擴展 + Coverage Audit.

plugins.name: che-apple-notes-mcp
plugins.description: Apple Notes MCP server — 18 tools. SQLite 快讀（<10ms）+ AppleScript 寫入（CloudKit-safe），FDA fallback。Folders/notes CRUD、search、batch、undo/redo，雙軌 body（plaintext 或 HTML）。

plugins.name: ai-docs-guide

plugins.name: che-ical-mcp
plugins.description: macOS 行事曆與提醒事項 MCP Server - EventKit 整合，28 個工具，支援 attendees/organizer、undo/redo、每事件時區、--cli 模式、--setup TCC 授權、彈性日期解析、模糊匹配、batch 操作

plugins.name: che-duckdb-mcp
plugins.description: Swift-native DuckDB MCP + guidance Skill — dual-source docs (llms.txt + full) with TF-IDF search + fuzzy function matching, plus 6 local DB tools (14 total). Pinned duckdb-swift, real DuckDB error messages, SessionStart hook for version check.

plugins.name: che-word-mcp
plugins.description: Word MCP Server - Swift 原生 OOXML 操作，233 個工具。v3.13.3 bump ooxml-swift v0.19.2→v0.19.3 — 修完 #56 round 2 verify 的 8 P0 + 3 must-fix P1（無 source 變更）。Batch A Hyperlink（P0-1 API path 視覺樣式恢復、P0-2 tgtFrame/docLocation Reader filter 修正、P0-3 ordered children 保留 source order、P1-7 Hyperlink.id 唯一）。Batch B Sort path（P0-4 contentControls emit、P0-5 commentIds/footnoteIds/endnoteIds/hasPageBreak emit、P0-8 hyperlink-only paragraph 路由）。Batch C Revision（P0-6 非文字 wrapper 保留、P0-7 nested hyperlink/SDT/fieldSimple 完整 round-trip）。Batch D Bookmark（P1-1 nextBookmarkId 校準、P1-4 API path 段落 wrap-around 還原）。v3.13.2 round 1 F1-F4 hot-fix。v3.13.1 pPr double-emission hot-fix。v3.13.0 document.xml lossless round-trip（closes #56 P0）。v3.12.0 Track Changes（#45）。基於 ooxml-swift v0.19.3。
